title: Boulevard of Broken Dreams
why_this_song: Boulevard of Broken Dreams by Green Day (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 21 times; first heard in: "I walk a lonely road"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "But it's home to me, and I walk alone"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "My shadow's the only one that walks beside me"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "My shadow's the only one that walks beside me"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "My shadow's the only one that walks beside me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "walk" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "walk" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: I walk alone, I walk a-

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Boulevard of Broken Dreams" was released in 2004. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Boulevard of Broken Dreams" foi lançada em 2004. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Boulevard of Broken Dreams" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Boulevard of Broken Dreams" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
